sub_problems: Identify multivariate signals during fine-tuning (loss curve features, gradient norm dynamics, eval-metric drift, activation-distribution shift) analogous to seismic/tilt/gas/temperature signals.
Build a time-lagged feature extractor across these signals; train a precursor classifier on labeled drift events.
Test cross-model transfer of the precursor classifier: does a classifier trained on model A's drift events generalize to model B?
